title: specularia speculum-veneris var. hirta
intro: Specularia speculum-veneris var. hirta is a plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae, commonly known as the bluebell or bellflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. It is also believed to have health benefits including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of the common cold. Herbal preparations of Specularia speculum-veneris var. hirta can be made into teas or infusions, allowing for a soothing and natural remedy for respiratory ailments.
